component.name: MessageReceiver_renewLock
MessageReceiver_receive
component.description: Receive message from queue or subscription. ```ballerina asb:Message? message = check receiver->receive(); ```

component.name: MessageReceiver_defer
MessageReceiver_receivePayload
component.description: Receive message payload from queue or subscription. ```ballerina string messagePayload = check receiver->receivePayload(); ```

component.name: MessageReceiver_abandon
component.description: Abandon message from queue or subscription based on messageLockToken. Abandon processing of the message for the time being, returning the message immediately back to the queue to be picked up by another (or the same) receiver. ```ballerina asb:Message message = ...; check receiver->abandon(message); ```

component.name: MessageReceiver_receiveDeferred
component.description: Receives a deferred Message. Deferred messages can only be received by using sequence number and return Message object. ```ballerina asb:Message? message = check receiver->receiveDeferred(1); ```

component.name: MessageReceiver_receiveBatch
component.description: Receive batch of messages from queue or subscription. ```ballerina asb:MessageBatch batch = check receiver->receiveBatch(10); ```

component.name: MessageReceiver_complete
MessageReceiver_deadLetter
MessageReceiver_close
component.description: Closes the ASB receiver connection. ```ballerina check receiver->close(); ```
